name: ContextAgent
description: Delegates context management to a remote ContextAgent HTTP service (context-engine slot).

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the ContextAgent HTTP service

apiKey.description: Optional Bearer token for ContextAgent API authentication

scopeId.description: Logical scope identifier — use per-channel or per-user value to isolate memories.

contextTokenBudget.description: Maximum tokens to inject via systemPromptAddition

retrievalMode.description: 'fast' uses hybrid retrieval; 'quality' uses LLM-driven agentic retrieval

topK.description: Number of context items to retrieve per assemble() call
